sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-quantized matrix converter using Q15 scale and zero-point with unsigned clamp.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational quantized integer GEMM datapath with zero-point subtraction and INT32 accumulation.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational INT32 accumulator dequantizer that applies combined Q15 scales and emits packed FP32 bit patterns.
